sections.title: Using a feather on enchanted scroll
Trying to create another enchanted quill with a feather
Trying to create another enchanted quill with an enchanted quill

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello again, [player name]! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about your client...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What am I meant to be doing, again?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: My client is interested in the hierarchy and general social organisation of Great Kourend. Especially when it comes to how it differs from the mainland.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: That scroll I given to you is special. When written on with a particular type of quill, my client will see what you're writing without anything being seen on the scroll itself.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Speak to the general store owners of each city. They should have enough knowledge of their own city to pry out of them what you need, and they always seem up for a chat.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Remember: simply use a feather on the scroll to attune it as a quill.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Veos!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost something you've given me.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I'll be happy to provide you with another scroll, [player name], though I'm afraid you don't seem to have any room in your backpack! Return to me when you have.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Worry not, [player], I have many of those scrolls. Luckily, due to the way it works, you haven't lost any information on it!

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Remember, if you still need to create a quill, simply attune a feather by using it on the scroll.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Veos!

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: You already have your scroll, [player], I can literally see it peeking out of your backpack...

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello again, [player name]! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you got any quests for me?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: As a matter of fact, [player name], I do...

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I have a client from the mainland who's interested in learning a bit more about Kourend. They've asked me to gather some information on the five cities for them.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I was just going to do it myself, but as you're quite new around here, this might be a good opportunity for you to get to know the kingdom a bit better.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: So what do you say?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds interesting! How can I help?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Take this scroll.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: My client is interested in the hierarchy and general social organisation of Great Kourend. Especially when it comes to how it differs from the mainland.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: That scroll is special. When written on with a particular type of quill, my client will see what you're writing without anything being seen on the scroll itself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait, wait! I'm not spying for somebody am I?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Not exactly... My client simply wishes to keep their 'knowledge gathering' on the down low.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That seems fair. Who should I speak to in order to find out more about the cities?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: There's many a man and woman who could give you the information you need, but general store owners in each city will likely be your best bet.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: They should know enough about their cities, and always seem up for a chat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good call. What about this special quill you mentioned?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Simply touching a normal feather onto the paper should synchronise their magical ability to work together. You don't need any ink.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, I'll return to you when I have the information your client needs.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: See you soon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm busy at the moment, actually. Not now.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Very well. Do come back if you wish to help out my client.

sections.title: Regath, the Arceuus General Store Owner

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: What do you require, traveller? I deal in many things.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I ask you about Arceuus?

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: This city holds knowledge many would deem unsafe to share. Why should I be so trusting to you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'm a...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uhm...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A journalist! Yes, a journalist from the mainland. I want to let the wider world know of how this incredible city works.

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: Someone willing to share knowledge of our great city to many others?

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: Very well, then. The rest of the world could certainly do with learning about our great library.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was hoping to write this all down but I don't have the correct equipment! I'll be back in a tick!

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: You're not a very good journalist if you forget your equipment. Very well, then. I'll await your return.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what exactly is it the people Arceuus bring to Great Kourend?

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: Arceuus is filled with literary and magical scholars. Lead by the great Trobin Arceuus. As a leader, he assists in pushing the limit of our knowledge surrounding magical abilities, souls and the crafting of runic energy.

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: He cares not for petty control, focusing instead on the expansion of knowledge within Great Kourend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is there to do in Arceuus?

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: Our library is something to behond, but the millennia of knowledge found there; runic, magical and religious, are but small findings compared to the power of the Dark Altar.

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: Through its power, we have great knowledge on life and death. This knowledge could be yours as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ARGH!

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: What is the matter, journalist?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I... I don't know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I must have caught my finger with the quill. Apologies; please continue.

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: Very well. As mentioned, rewards on offer within our city are priceless. The sharing of our magical research is but child's play compared to the knowledge of Blood and Soul runecrafting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help!

lines.speaker: Regath
lines.text: You're welcome. Spread the word of this great city with the new knowledge you have gained, and perhaps be more careful with how you hold your scroll in the future...

sections.title: Horace, the Hosidius General Store Owner

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: Hello, I'm Horace. Welcome to my shop. Would you like to buy or sell something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I ask you about Hosidius?

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: Well, well my friend! I've lived in this great and glorious city all of my life. I'd be happy to share with you anything you'd like to know!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear, I'm sorry. I was hoping to write this all down but I don't have the correct equipment! Can you hold that thought?

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: Absolutely. I'm always up for a chat with any of my new patrons!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is it that Hosidius provides for Great Kourend?

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: Hosidius is filled with keen and skilled farmers alike! Lead by the incredibly efficient Kandur Hosidius, his intelligent resourcefulness ensures optimal agricultural production.

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: Our fields stretch as far as the eye can see. With incredible teamwork and group efforts, the ability to provide Great Kourend's people with food and herbal supplies is quite literally the fruits of our labour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is there to do in Hosidius?

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: Our personal kitchens and farming patches are lovely. That being said, the real gems of Hosidius are the vinery and Tithe farm. Both are world class!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help, Horace!

lines.speaker: Horace
lines.text: Anytime, friend! Feel free to pop along if you ever need any wares!

sections.title: Munty, the Lovakengj General Store Owner

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: Can I help you, human?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I ask you about Lovakengj?

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: Why I'd be happy to have a chat! I do enjoy talking about this great city of ours.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear, excuse me, I was hoping to write this all down but I don't have the correct equipment! I'll be back in a tick!

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: Very well, I look forward to chatting with you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is it that Lovakengj provides for Great Kourend?

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: Lovakengj is filled with incredibly skilled blacksmiths. Under the leadership of Vulcana Lovakengj, our intelligent material saving skills make us the finest blacksmiths in the land.

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: Armours, weaponry, tools and structures - our city supplies Kourend with all of these to the finest standards known to Dwarf and Human alike.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is there to do in Lovakenj?

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: Well creating dynamite and mining in the sulphur mine isn't a pretty job, but someone has to do it!

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: We also make the armour worn by the very soldiers of the Shayzien Army here, not to mention the Blast Mine.

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: The rewards able to be reaped in our city are nothing to be scoffed at!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help!

lines.speaker: Munty
lines.text: Anytime! Come back soon!

sections.title: Leenz, the Port Piscarilius General Store Owner

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: A great adventurer, from afar? How may I help with my repertoire?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I ask you about Port Piscarilius?

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: If it's Piscarilius information you seek, it's in my brain that you must peek!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I was hoping to write this all down but I don't have the correct equipment! Can you hold that rhyme?

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: If there's one thing, that I do best, it's waiting patiently, for my guests!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're certainly a chirpy woman! What is it that Port Piscarilius provides for Great Kourend?

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: Within Port Piscarilius, you'll find, great fisherman, traders, pirates and I. All lead, by our ruthless leader, Shauna Piscarilius, none yet to supersede her.

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: No surprise if you meet her, her tactics are ruthless. Her demeanour renders, all pirates toothless.

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: Our great shore and trading, have treasures to be found, providing export and fish, in quantities abound.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is there to do in Port Piscarilius?

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: Our shore is brimming, with gold from the sea, the most loyal of our people, are handed the key. We'll let you stand on our shores and collect, the great anglerfish; other only... covet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hang on a second... that last one didn't rhyme too well!

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: Listen here pal, you don't mess with people in Port Piscarilius. Do you want happy rhyming Leenz, or angry, gruff and pain-inflicting Leenz?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Happy rhyming Leenz, please! Thanks for your help!

lines.speaker: Leenz
lines.text: Anytime, my adventuring friend, enjoy your time in Great Kourend!

sections.title: Jennifer, the Shayzien General Store Owner

lines.speaker: Jennifer
lines.text: What're yer looking for, me luv'?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I ask you about Shayzien?

lines.speaker: Jennifer
lines.text: Well I could give you some info if that's all yer wantin'. Gets lonely in 'ere while me mates are out there fightin' the good war!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Apologies, I was hoping to write this all down but I don't have the correct equipment!

lines.speaker: Jennifer
lines.text: Well ye canne remember everything I 'ave to say about this wee 'ouse without that, can you? Come back when yer 'ead's not all fried!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is it that Shayzien provides for Great Kourend?

lines.speaker: Jennifer
lines.text: Phwoar, what don' we do? This place is filled with officers and the like. Lead by our rig'rous leader Shiro Shayzien, 'e ensures ultimate justice and safety for the entirety of Great Kourend.

lines.speaker: Jennifer
lines.text: Our soldiers fight off the constant threat of the lizardman, while our 'ighly trained medics 'eal them from battle. Strict in combat trainin' and discipline. Law, order and defence. These are the words we live by!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is there to do in Shayzien?

lines.speaker: Jennifer
lines.text: It ain't all pretty 'ere, but if you 'elp our soldiers and tackle some organised crime... you'll soon find that the spoils o' war are grand.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help!

lines.speaker: Jennifer
lines.text: That's alright petal, you go'un and have fun.

sections.title: Talking to Veos again after receiving the orb

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello again, [player name]! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about your client...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what exactly is it your client now wants me to do?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Take this orb.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost something you've given me.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: You already have the orb, [player name], I can literally see it peeking out of your backpack...

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I'll be happy to provide you with another orb, [player name], though I'm afraid you don't seem to have any room in your backpack! Return to me when you have room.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Please be more careful, [player name]. Remember to return to me when you have used the orb in the area.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Veos!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello again, [player name]! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about your client...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have gathered information from all of the cities.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I could hear a voice, Veos... in my head! As if it whispered in my ear to return to you!

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Yes, I heard it too... they mentioned that your task was complete.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Let me take those items off your hands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That reminds me, Veos! I didn't sign up to this! I wasn't told that my mind would be entered. And what about the possibility of severely damaging my hand?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: If it makes you feel any better, my client sends their apologies. It wasn't intentional. Needless to say, something you said provoked emotion...

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Namely...

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: The Dark Altar...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If I knew mentioning the Dark Altar would upset them so much, I'd have not written that bit of information down!

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Well that's just the thing, [player name]. My client is pleased you found such information. Tell me... Would you be willing to do one last thing for them?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I don't necessarily believe I have much of a choice!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What should I do now?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I'm certainly glad you're able to assist once again.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: My client will be most pleased.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: My client requires... another simple task. They assure me that it will be the last. Take this orb. You must activate it beside the Dark Altar, north of Arceuus.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I ask why I would do that?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: It's best you don't.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, can't argue with that! I'll return when I'm done!

sections.title: Using the "Activate" option on the mysterious orb by the Dark Altar

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Argh!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I really wish I would be warned about these things earlier...

sections.title: Trying to activate the orb in a different location

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello again, [player name]! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Veos, enough is enough! I've suffered through enough. Exploding orbs and burning quills...

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: [player name]? What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know darn well what I'm talking about!

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: [player name], I haven't spoken with you since bringing you to Kourend, I have no idea what you're on ab--

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: ARGH!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Veos, this isn't funny anymore... Are you alright? I did all that your client asked of me...

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Indeed you have.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uhm... Veos?

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: You have done well. For that, you have my thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you? What have you done with Veos?

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: You need not fear for him. I will ensure no harm comes his way.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: As for who I am... Well, that is of no importance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a right to know!

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Knowledge can be a curse. Sometimes, it is better to remain unaware.

lines.speaker: Veos' Client
lines.text: Now, time to release this mind back to consciousness... Don't worry, I'll make sure he rewards you. After all, you've been very useful to me...
